headline: Northern Trust Appointed to Provide CK Capital Partners with Asset Servicing Solutions
summary: AMSTERDAM, March 03, 2026--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) announced today that it has been appointed to provide asset servicing solutions to Netherlands-based fund manager CK Capital Partners.
